payload.answer: I can’t extract a durable memory from this input as-is. If you intended to save something, please restate it plainly.
repair_options: Treat as non-memory chatter and do not store anything.
Ask the user to restate a concrete fact they want remembered.
If this was meant as an affirmation, store nothing because it does not contain a stable memory fact.
